capability_window.capability_slice: Convert skill and route evidence into bounded local lanes that can be validated before activation.

items.name: reverse-flow-skill
items.title: Reverse-flow Codex skill workflow gate
items.summary: Codex and AI Agent skill workflow gate evidence with skills/reverse-flow, SKILL.md, local sandbox framing, staged workflow language, diagnostic scripts, install examples, and runtime wording that must remain diagnostic before local validation.

items.name: rnskill
items.title: Generic SKILL.md workflow collection
items.summary: Generic SKILL.md skill collection for Codex, Claude Code, and other agent workflows with skills directory, docs, tools, marketplace metadata, manual install examples, and no current local activation proof.

items.name: shepherd
items.title: Shepherd reversible agent runtime substrate
items.summary: General agent runtime substrate evidence with reversible traces, fork, replay, revert, supervision, and runtime claims that require local agent harness evaluation before implementation.

items.name: Hy3
items.title: Hy3 general agent and MCP workflow pressure
items.summary: General agent and MCP workflow evidence with provider and runtime integration pressure that requires local agent harness evaluation before implementation.

items.name: Awesome-Blender-Seedance-Workflow-Usecases
items.title: Blender Seedance workflow use cases
items.summary: Workflow use-case collection for AI filmmaking, Blender MCP, camera control, reference video, and agent-guided workflows that requires local agent harness evaluation before implementation.
